content.en:
"Do it, kill him!"

Kanshui Son proposed.

The other five holy sons nodded their heads one by one, and at this time there was no choice but to gamble.

If the bet wins, they rise completely!

Kill the Holy Endowment, in the past, they didn't dare to think about it.

Those who have not risen and whose cultivation is still relatively low have people who have guardians, and it is almost difficult to fall, after all, the Holy Endowment represents a father or mother with the level of a Supreme Domain Ancestor, and with a Supreme Domain Ancestor as a backer, who would dare to kill them?

Therefore, unless the Holy Endowed is unlucky, almost all of them can grow up to the Supreme Domain Ancestor and above.

If it was a normal time, where would they have the opportunity to kill a Holy Endowment, the Holy Endowment would kill them.

Rumble!!!!!

The six holy sons shuttled in and killed Ye Tian together.

They don't have holy relics, and the weapons they hold are top-notch domain weapons, but they're pretty good.

One Holy Son casts a Confining Domain Technique, one Holy Son casts a Soul Impact Domain Technique, two Holy Sons cast an offensive Domain Technique, and two Holy Sons cast a defensive Domain Technique, and the six Holy Sons cooperate so well and have a very tacit understanding.

Ye Tian is also very dignified, these six holy sons are not ordinary top domain ancestors, one by one can be regarded as the strongest domain ancestors, although they are not very powerful supreme domain ancestors, but they are much stronger than the weaker supreme domain ancestors.

The six Holy Sons are equivalent to the six Supreme Domain Ancestors, and although Ye Tian can now kill the Supreme Domain Ancestors, his single strength is not much stronger than these six Holy Sons.

His only advantage is that he has the Immortal Saint Technique, and he recovers from his injuries quickly.

And once these six holy sons are severely damaged, I am afraid it will be difficult to recover.

"Immortal Holy Technique!"

"Holy Armor Holy Technique!"

"Golden Body Holy Technique!"

"Void Slash Holy Technique!"

A door saint technique was displayed by Ye Tian, completely shocking the six holy sons.

Because in their impressions, a Holy Son would only have two holy skills of the same type at most, and three more holy skills would be more demonic.

But now, Ye Tian has performed a variety of holy techniques, and none of them belong to the same category, what is the situation?

Could it be that there are any secrets among the Saints that he does not understand?

Bang!!!

The domain attack of the two Holy Sons bombarded Ye Tian's body, although they repelled Ye Tian, they did not do Ye Tian any damage, and the soul impact of the other Holy Son could not shake Ye Tian's Holy Technique Suppression Spirit.

And Ye Tian's Void Slash Holy Technique is a consummation-level space attack Holy Skill, and its power can be imagined how terrifying it is!

Click!

The defensive domain technique cast by the two Holy Sons was immediately torn apart, and the Void Slash Holy Technique slashed at the two Holy Sons in front.

The defenses on their bodies were immediately torn apart, and the power of the Holy Technique began to extend into their bodies.

Thankfully, the power of the Holy Technique had been weakened in multiple ways, so it didn't hurt them hard, but it hurt them as well.

"It's so strong, it's just an ordinary realm body consummation saint endower, and the strength is so strong?"

Kanshui Holy Son They were stunned, they couldn't believe it, this simply broke their cognition!

It's not that they've never seen the battle between the Saint Endowments, but even the Saint Grants who have just broken through to the Elite Domain Ancestor level are just at this level!

Next, they continued to besiege Ye Tian, but they couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian possessed the holy artifact Jin Chen Armor, as well as the two defensive consummation holy skills, no matter how powerful his defensive ability was, it was difficult for the six great holy sons to seriously damage him, and the ordinary injuries recovered under the immortal holy skills in an instant.

On the other hand, their six holy sons, at this time, their injuries were getting more and more serious.

"I can't beat it!"

Kanshui Holy Son said solemnly.

If they continue to fight, Ye Tian has not yet fallen, and they will have to fall.

"Open the door of time and space!"

After exchanging with the six holy sons, they decided.

"Son of the Dead Universe, the key to time and space is on you, open the door of time and space, and let the strong men of your Demon Hell Group come over. Once the Gate of Time and Space is opened, the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain can descend at any time. At that time, unless the powerhouses of the Dark Sanctuary also come, they will not be able to protect this Holy Endower!"

Kanshui Holy Son said.

"Good!"

The Son of the Dead Universe responded.

It stands to reason that if you don't succeed in destroying a realm, you can't open the door of time and space in advance, which is not in order.

After all, the cost of opening the gate of time and space is relatively large, under normal circumstances, they destroy a realm, if they do not encounter danger, they do not need to open the gate of time and space, and they can slowly return to the dark destruction domain.

If you encounter a great harvest, you need to ensure that you return in time before you need to open the door of time and space.

Otherwise, if the gate of time and space is used indiscriminately, the Dark Destruction Domain will not be able to withstand such consumption.

It is rumored that the Dark Destruction Domain casually uses the Gate of Time and Space is wrong.

The ones who can really use the Gate of Time and Space casually are the Holy Sons of the Destruction Holy Clan, and they, the Holy Sons of the Evil Race, dare not waste the opportunity to use the Gate of Time and Space.

But there is no way to do it now, if they don't open the gate of time and space, it will be easy to fall.

Moreover, the discovery of a saint-endowed person is enough to open the door of time and space, and not only is they not guilty, but they are a great merit.

Wow!

The Son of the Dead Universe instantly left the battlefield, away from here, and came to the vicinity of the ship.

Immediately, he took out the space-time key, and the power was poured into it, to open the space-time key.

The power kept pouring in, and it only took about a minute or so for him to successfully open the door of time and space.

For a minute, he didn't think anyone could stop him.

The average top domain ancestor is sent to death when he comes.

Even if he is open, he is enough to exert more than half of his strength.

And Ye Tian was dragged by the Five Great Holy Sons, and it was difficult to stop him.

Unless there is a hidden Supreme Domain Ancestor here, or an Invincible Domain Ancestor, he can definitely open the door of time and space.

Buzz Buzz!!

An illusory door to time and space emerged, condensing.

Ye Tian recognized it at a glance, this was the gate of time and space.

"It turns out that the gate of time and space is in the hands of this holy son!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Just when the Son of the Dead thought that he could successfully open the gate of time and space, an attack struck.

Burst!!!!

The Holy Technique Void Slash cut it, and instantly cut the arm of the Dead Universe Holy Son.

Then, a figure quickly took the arm of the Dead Universe Saint Son and grabbed the space-time key in his hand.

The opening of the portal was interrupted, and the illusion dissipated.

"You ......"

The Son of the Dead Universe was dumbfounded.

Ye Tian!

What's going on?

Two Ye Tian, is this a clone?

But it is impossible for the clone to have such a strong strength, and how can the clone be able to perform holy skills?
